title: pteris glabra
intro: Pteris glabra, also known as the Smooth Brake Fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Pteridaceae, characterized by its smooth and glabrous fronds. Traditionally, Pteris glabra has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Pteris glabra is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
